scenes.description: Performance of the song "Re-Alive" by Moona Hoshinova, Kureiji Ollie, Pavolia Reine, and Anya Melfissa.
Performance of the song "MIRA" by Kureiji Ollie, Anya Melfissa, and Vestia Zeta.
Dialogue segment leading into the performance of "Lazy Monday".
